languages.text: Электрические всполохи, словно гнев самого Бога-Императора, пронизали воздух, ограждая людей от несущих смерть ксеносов. Один за одним, служители Омниссии падали, истекая кровью и машинным елеем, но их оказалось слишком мало. Часть ксеносов пала, но прочие лишь усилили натиск, ступая по телам умирающих техножрецов. Из отряда уцелели лишь единицы — но, вопреки судьбе, вопреки всей чудовищной силе врага, я и потомок остались невредимы.

Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.
languages.original_text: Электрические всполохи, словно гнев самого Бога-Императора, пронизали воздух, ограждая людей от несущих смерть ксеносов. Один за одним, служители Омниссии падали, истекая кровью и машинным елеем, но их оказалось слишком мало. Часть ксеносов пала, но прочие лишь усилили натиск, ступая по телам умирающих техножрецов. Из отряда уцелели лишь единицы — но, вопреки судьбе, вопреки всей чудовищной силе врага, я и потомок остались невредимы.

traits.locale_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Electric flashes of the Omnissiah's blessed wrath pierced the air, shielding people from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Machine God fell down, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to step up their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed./

Electric flashes of the Omnissiah's blessed wrath pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed./

Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

languages.text: Los destellos eléctricos, similares a la cólera del propio Dios Emperador, atravesaron el aire, protegiendo a los humanos de la muerte que traían los xenos. Uno tras otro, los sirvientes del Omnissiah cayeron, derramando su sangre y ungüentos sagrados, pero eran demasiado pocos. Numerosos xenos fueron abatidos, pero el resto continuó su avance por encima de los cuerpos de los moribundos tecnosacerdotes. De la unidad solo quedábamos un puñado, pero, desafiando al destino y frustrando a nuestro poderoso enemigo, mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo salimos ilesos.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: Los destellos eléctricos, similares a la cólera del propio Dios Emperador, atravesaron el aire, protegiendo a los humanos de la muerte que traían los xenos. Uno tras otro, los sirvientes del Omnissiah cayeron, derramando su sangre y ungüentos sagrados, pero eran demasiado pocos. Numerosos xenos fueron abatidos, pero el resto continuó su avance por encima de los cuerpos de los moribundos tecnosacerdotes. De la unidad solo quedábamos un puñado, pero, desafiando al destino y frustrando a nuestro poderoso enemigo, mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo salimos ilesos.

languages.text: Des éclairs électriques, semblables à la fureur de l'Empereur-Dieu Lui-même, fendirent l'air, protégeant les humains contre les xénos. Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie tombèrent les uns après les autres, couvrant le sol de leur sang et d'onguents sacrés, mais ils étaient trop peu nombreux. Si plusieurs xénos furent abattus, les autres poursuivirent leur assaut implacable, piétinant les corps des technoprêtres agonisants. Seule une poignée parvint à s'en sortir, dont mon {mf|héritier|héritière} et moi-même, défiant le destin et déjouant cet ennemi d'une puissance incommensurable.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Les serviteurs de l'Omnimessie tombèrent les uns après les autres, couvrant le sol de leur sang et d'onguents sacrés, mais ils étaient trop peu nombreux. languages.text: 电光迸射，犹如神皇本尊之盛怒撕裂长空，保护人类免遭告死异形的毒手。欧姆尼赛亚的仆从接二连三地倒下，鲜血与神圣机油四处飞溅。只可惜他们人数太少。虽有几个异形被击倒，可更多敌人仍踩着技术神甫们的尸体推进。小队几近全灭，只有零星数人幸存。即便如此，我与继承人依然违逆了必死的宿命，挫败了那骇人强敌的必杀之局。
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

languages.text: Elektrische Blitze zuckten wie die Wut des Gottimperators Selbst durch die Luft und schützten die Menschen vor den todbringenden Xenos. Einer nach dem anderen fielen die Diener des Omnissiah. Sie vergossen Blut und heilige Substanz, waren aber in der Unterzahl. Einige Xenos wurden erschlagen, doch der Rest setzte seinen Ansturm auf den Leibern sterbender Techpriester fort. Nur eine Handvoll unserer Leute überlebte ... aber allen Gefahren zum Trotz besiegten {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} und ich unseren monströsen Feind und blieben unversehrt.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

languages.text: Tanrı İmparator Hazretleri'nin gazabını andıran elektrik çakımları, havayı delip geçerek insanları ölüm getiren zenolardan korudu. Hermesih'in hizmetkârları, kan ve kutsal özyağ dökerek birbiri ardına düşse de sayıları çok azdı. Zenoların bir kısmı yere serildi ama geri kalanlar, ölen Tekno Rahiplerin bedenlerini çiğneyerek saldırılarını ilerletti. Mangadan sadece bir avuç kişi hayatta kaldı... Yine de kadere meydan okuyan ve o korkunç derecede güçlü düşmanımızı hüsrana uğratan vârisim ve ben, yara almadan kurtulduk.
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

Yine de kadere meydan okuyan ve o korkunç derecede güçlü düşmanımızı hüsrana uğratan vârisim ve ben, yara almadan kurtulduk.

languages.text: 神帝の怒りのごとく、電撃が空を裂き、人間を死をもたらす異種族から守った。オムニシアのしもべたちは次々と倒れ、血と聖なる油を流したが、数が足りなかった。異種族は数人倒されたものの、残りは生き残ったテクプリストの死体の上を踏みながら、攻撃を続けた。この部隊からはわずかな数しか生き残らなかったが、運命に逆らい、恐ろしく強力な敵を打ち破った。私の血縁者と私は、無事だった。
languages.original_text: Electric flashes, like the wrath of the God-Emperor Himself, pierced the air, shielding the humans from the death-bringing xenos. One after another, the servants of the Omnissiah fell, spilling blood and sacred unguent, but they were too few. A number of the xenos were struck down, only for the rest to advance their onslaught, treading on the bodies of the dying Tech-Priests. Only a handful survived from the squad — yet, defying fate and thwarting our monstrously powerful enemy, my scion and I were unharmed.

traits.locale_text: 神帝の怒りのごとく、電撃が空を裂き、人間を死をもたらす異種族から守った。オムニシアのしもべたちは次々と倒れ、血と聖なる油を流したが、数が足りなかった。異種族は数人倒されたものの、残りは生き残ったテクプリストの死体の上を踏みながら、攻撃を続けた。この部隊からはわずかな数しか生き残らなかったが、運命に逆らい、恐ろしく強力な敵を打ち破った。私の血縁者と私は、無事だった。
